_comment: Flow Framework declarative dependency manifest. Edited by humans, consumed by scripts/flow_install.py and scripts/flow_doctor.py. Required deps fail-loud on install; optional deps emit warnings only.

required.name: python3
required.hint: Required by flow scripts (tomllib, modern type syntax)

optional.name: gh
optional.hint: GitHub CLI for /codex review etc — https://cli.github.com/

marketplaces.name: context-mode
marketplaces.purpose: Session persistence + tool output sandboxing (P0 dep for flow v0.4)

marketplaces.name: karpathy-skills
marketplaces.purpose: Behavioral guidelines (surgical changes, define success criteria, etc.)

external_skills._comment: Skill bundles that are NOT distributed via the Claude plugin marketplace system. They install as loose skill directories under ~/.claude/skills/<bundle>/ and are auto-discovered. Capability mappings in claude/capabilities/defaults.json reference them (e.g. gstack:codex for cross_model_*).

optional.name: gstack
optional.install: git clone https://github.com/garrytan/gstack.git ~/.claude/skills/gstack && cd ~/.claude/skills/gstack && bun install && bun run build
optional.note: defaults.json model_roles.research.fallback and several capabilities.cross_model_* assume gstack:codex availability. Without gstack, those capabilities silently degrade to the codex CLI directly (still works for review, but loses the prompt scaffolding for review/challenge/consult modes).
